name: Sol
description: A separate collection for lightweight computational tools, visual demonstrations, calendars, and small mathematical applications. This homepage acts as a map rather than a container for those tools.

name: Hamiltonian LGT and quantum simulation explorations
description: Computational experiments related to Hamiltonian lattice gauge theory and quantum simulation.

name: Mongolian calendar computation
description: Calendar-computation material belongs outside this homepage and can be linked here as a separate project.

name: Illustrative simulations
description: A curated pointer to illustrative simulations and animations kept outside the main homepage.

name: Ancient planetary models
description: Animations and notes related to ancient planetary models, kept as a separate computational or historical project.

name: Old McGill homepage archive
description: Legacy academic pages and course materials from the McGill era.
